query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_properties,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrStatus = 'LISTED' AND chrPurpose = 'SALE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_for_sale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteNewListing >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as angariacoes_mes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baixas_mes,
  AVG(dcmSale) as valor_medio
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068';

  SUM(CASE WHEN chrStatus = 'LISTED' AND chrPurpose = 'SALE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_for_sale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteNewListing >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as angariacoes_mes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baixas_mes,
  AVG(dcmSale) as valor_medio
